Renewable.heading: Renewable Energy
Renewable.header: As the need for clean, sustainable energy increases, and renewable technologies get ever more advanced
Renewable.titleForProjectList: Our solar projects - click for more info:
Renewable.content: Let’s face it, our fossil fuel-based system needs an upgrade. Instead of spewing CO2e until we run out of dead dinosaurs to burn, let’s go all-in on renewable technology now. That’s why solar is so important: it can bring electricity to millions while keeping fossil fuels in the ground.

Reforestation.heading: Reforestation
Reforestation.header: Reforestation projects help small and disadvantaged populations to plant trees and reforest
Reforestation.titleForProjectList: Our Reforestation projects - click for more info:
Reforestation.content: In order to avert a climate catastrophe, research shows we must take CO2e out of the atmosphere. Inventors around the world are working on big machines to suck carbon out of the air and capture it underground. Meanwhile, nature already built those machines for us: They’re called trees, and they are a crucial part of protecting our climate.

detailedContent.para1: Our meat & dairy consumption along with illegal logging are driving deforestation across the world. This has a huge impact on global warming as trees can absorb 30% of global emissions every year. Besides depriving us of natural carbon captors, forest clearance is also harming the biodiversity and local communities of those ecosystems.
detailedContent.para2: The restoration of a forest falls under the nature-based solutions (NbS) umbrella. When combined, these can achieve a carbon reduction of up to 10-gigaton CO2e by 2050. By including forestation and other carbon offset forestry projects within its portfolio, CarbonTrace will let you bring the following benefits in India and other countries:
detailedContent.listOfContent: GHG emissions reduction; Making tree planting more profitable than logging; Creation of new habitats for native flora and fauna; Provision of new living space for Indigenous people.
detailedContent.description: Uplifted by your support, our reforestation project aims to cover a 5,000-ha area over the next 5 years.

Waste.heading: Waste Management
Waste.header: These Projects aims to put in force sustainable systems of waste collection & segregation
Waste.titleForProjectList: Our Waste Management projects - click for more info:
Waste.content: It is a known fact that the amount of waste recycled is lesser compared to the amount of waste created across India, marking an impending threat to the environment and sustainability. Hence, it becomes necessary to focus on various initiatives that include Waste Management.
